message:
bd-ml2r.9.3: add structured recommendations with category/confidence

Add StructuredRecommendation type to FNX diagnostics:
- RecommendationCategory: Simplify, Connect, Redundancy, Clarify
- RecommendationConfidence: High, Medium, Low
- Rationale explaining why the recommendation is made
- Concrete action steps with optional examples

Each diagnostic now includes a recommendation field with:
- Disconnected components: Connect category, confidence based on size
- Articulation points: Redundancy category, medium confidence
- Bridge edges: Redundancy category, low confidence
- Dense cycles: Simplify category, confidence based on cycle size

Provides machine-readable metadata for CLI and WASM front-end display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
